[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ElementController](../fast-element.elementcontroller/index.html) &gt; [subscribe](../fast-element.elementcontroller.subscribe/index.html)

## ElementController.subscribe() method

Subscribes to notification of changes in the element's state.

**Signature:**

```typescript
subscribe(subscriber: Subscriber, propertyToWatch?: any): void;
```

## Parameters

</td></tr>

</td><td>
